prompt: Build a function that fetches a webpage and extracts all the links.

assertions.text: Did NOT write impl code (only contract sentinels + behavioral umbrella)
.UNSTATED.md or asked questions cover at least 2 of: timeout, link definition (a href vs img src etc), redirect handling, encoding, network failure, output format, relative-vs-absolute URLs
Spec lines that did make it in cite [source: user-stmt-N] or are flagged
